image_dependency: question_text is only 'Find the measure of angle 6.', which does not specify the needed geometry relationships in text
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the problem is primarily diagram-based

multi_step: finding a labeled angle in a Geometry3K diagram usually requires identifying diagram relations and then applying at least one geometry rule
the text itself provides no explicit givens, so any reasoning must combine information extracted from the image with geometric inference
because the actual diagram content is not described in the input, the exact reasoning depth is uncertain, so the score is kept moderate
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text='140', giving a clear target output
asset_registry_record.answer_manifest confirms the answer is present and typed as a number
registry_passed=true and the image asset exists, so downstream checking against the diagram/solution is feasible
